Placement: mobile app install/feed ad
Required canvas: 1080 x 1350 px
Required aspect ratio: 4:5 vertical
Safe margin: 72 px.
Logo: top-left safe area.
Headline: upper third, max 2 lines.
Phone UI mockup: center-right or middle, not covering disclosure.
CTA: lower third above disclosure.
Disclosure: bottom safe area, at least 24 px equivalent, high contrast.
